name: ThioJoe
oneLine: Long-running tech-tips YouTuber who pivoted from satirical fake tutorials to genuine Windows and consumer-tech advice.
bio: Joe Thio (b. 1992) started ThioJoe in the early 2010s with deliberately absurd joke tutorials (How to Download More RAM) and pivoted in 2017 to making real tech videos full-time. The main channel now covers Windows tips, registry tweaks, browser settings, scam awareness, and small open-source utilities he writes himself (hosted on github.com/ThioJoe). He also runs the spinoff ThioJoeTech and operates several mostly-dormant channels (ThioJoeGaming, Vid Authority).
style: Edited solo talking-head plus screen-recordings, 5-15 minutes, with a calm conversational delivery and on-screen click-through demos.
notable: How to Download More RAM (early joke era)
